codeReview.summary: Round 11 review confirms the fix from commit 70b0118 properly addresses the prior blocking issue. The McpServerConfig.env HashMap is now correctly applied to the spawned server process via McpClient::new_with_env() + .envs(&self.env) in connect(). All env vars will be passed through.

issues.description: McpClient struct now has env: HashMap<String, String> field to store environment variables for the spawned process.
New new_with_env() constructor accepts env HashMap and stores it in the client.
connect() now calls .envs(&self.env) on the Command before spawning, ensuring all env vars are applied to the spawned process.
start_server() now uses McpClient::new_with_env(server_config.to_command_string(), server_config.env) to pass the env HashMap from config to the client.

summary: PASS - The fix commit 70b0118 properly addresses the round 10 blocking issue. McpServerConfig.env is now correctly passed to the spawned server process via: McpConfigManager::start_server() → McpClient::new_with_env(server_config.to_command_string(), server_config.env) → connect() calls .envs(&self.env) on the Command. The env HashMap is no longer silently ignored.
